name: ptoBalance
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/hr.js). 3-arg dispatch via /api/lens/run on key 'hr.ptoBalance'. HrActionPanel sends FLAT { employeeId, annualDays } and renders r.result.{accrued,used,remaining,rolloverDate}. Deterministic: accrued = annualDays/12 * monthsElapsed (current-month inclusive, so <= annualDays); used = sum of STATE-approved PTO for the employee this year (0 when none / STATE absent); remaining = accrued - used; rolloverDate = next Jan 1. Was DEAD before the 2026-06-28 fix (handler read totalPTO/usedPTO/pendingRequests and returned monthsRemaining/burnRate/projectedYearEnd). POISON: 'Infinity' annualDays rejects (Number()+isFinite, NOT parseFloat); a 'NaN'-days STATE row collapses to 0 so remaining stays finite. Not driven by macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/hr-lens-macros.test.js.
